specs.title: cp-000: Non-timeout failures surface either the API error string or Search failed Please
cp-001: Starting a fresh search clears the current error state
cp-002: Starting a fresh search clears the current aiSummary state before synthesis reru
cp-003: Search success replaces the current results array instead of appending to it
cp-004: Successful searches persist a search-history row through saveSearchQuery without
cp-005: Search-history save payload includes originalQuery queryType user source all res
cp-006: Session persistence key is exactly scholar-sync-research-page
cp-007: Persisted session payload includes query results filters sort hasSearched page t
cp-008: Session restore repopulates the page from sessionStorage on mount when valid cac
cp-009: Restoring a cached searched state sets the init-skip ref so filterssort do not i
cp-010: Session write failures such as storage quota overflow are silently ignored
cp-011: User plan is loaded once on mount through getUserUsageStats
cp-012: If plan lookup fails the page falls back to free
cp-013: Empty-state history load requests getRecentSearches and getUserPapers in paralle
cp-014: Empty-state history load is skipped when restored session state already contains
cp-015: Suggested-search chips are limited to the first 5 items from the 15-item suggest
cp-016: Clicking a suggested search stores that query in state and triggers a follow-up
cp-017: Recent Searches section renders only when recentSearcheslength 0
cp-018: Recent search rows show the result-count suffix only when resultCount 0
cp-019: Recent search rows rerun the saved query when clicked
cp-020: Recently Saved section renders only when recentPaperslength 0
cp-021: Recently Saved cards are limited to the first 4 papers returned from getUserPape
cp-022: Recently Saved author text shows at most two authors followed by et al when more
cp-023: Empty-state loading helper reads Loading your history
cp-024: Empty-state loading helper appears only while history is loading and there are n
cp-025: Last 5 Years filter toggles a boolean chip state instead of opening a date picke
cp-026: Turning Last 5 Years on clears both manual year inputs
cp-027: Typing either manual year input forces last5Years back to false
cp-028: Manual year inputs use placeholders From and To
cp-029: Manual year inputs do not set explicit min or max attributes in the current impl
cp-030: PDF Available filter translates to openAccessOnlytrue in the search request
cp-031: High Impact filter does not update visible sort state it overrides the outgoing
cp-032: RCTs Only adds rct to the outgoing studyTypes query parameter
cp-033: Reviews adds both review and systematic_review to the outgoing studyTypes query
cp-034: Meta-Analyses adds meta_analysis to the outgoing studyTypes query parameter
